componentDescription: ProgressBar visualizes completion of a process or task as a filled bar. Use it for file uploads, onboarding completion, multi-step form progress, or profile completion. For step-based workflows with named steps, use Stepper instead.
features: Multiple semantic variants for color-coded meaning
Size variants for different visual weights

usageExamples.title: File upload progress
usageExamples.description: Progress bar showing file upload completion percentage.
usageExamples.code:
<ProgressBar
  value={uploadProgress}
  variant="primary"
  size="md"
  label="Uploading file..."
  showLabel
/>

usageExamples.title: Profile completion indicator
usageExamples.description: Progress bar in a profile card showing how complete the user's profile is.
usageExamples.code: Profile completion {completionPercent}%

usageExamples.title: Danger threshold indicator
usageExamples.description: Storage usage bar that turns red when near capacity.
usageExamples.code:
<ProgressBar
  value={storageUsedPercent}
  variant={storageUsedPercent > 90 ? 'error' : storageUsedPercent > 70 ? 'warning' : 'primary'}
  size="md"
  label={`${storageUsed} of ${storageTotal} used`}
  showLabel
/>

value.llmContext: Required. A number between 0 and 100 representing the completion percentage. 0 is empty, 100 is fully filled. Always clamp your actual values to this range before passing them in.

variant.llmContext: Use 'primary' for general progress. Use 'success' when the process is complete or going well. Use 'warning' for processes approaching limits (e.g., 75% storage used). Use 'error' for processes at risk or over limit.
variant.propDescription: Color variant of the progress bar fill

size.llmContext: Use 'sm' for subtle inline indicators (profile cards, table rows). Use 'md' for standard progress displays. Use 'lg' for prominent onboarding or feature highlight flows.
size.propDescription: Controls the height/thickness of the progress bar

showLabel.llmContext: Set to true to display the label text above or alongside the bar. Use when context is needed to explain what the bar represents.
showLabel.propDescription: Shows the label text alongside the progress bar
